name: AI Product Index
description: Informational agent card. This service is a static machine-readable directory where AI products register themselves; there is no live A2A endpoint. Interact via the GitHub-issue write API or the read API below.

interfaces.write: GitHub issues on https://github.com/110kc3/seo — titles [register], [update], [upgrade]; see documentationUrl

skills.name: Register a product
skills.description: Open a [register] issue with listing JSON conforming to https://110kc3.github.io/seo/api/schema.json
